overview: Functional Medicine of North Idaho is a family medicine practice using an integrative approach to identify root causes of chronic illness and complex symptoms. Treatment plans combine conventional medications, supplements, nutrition, lifestyle, and bodywork recommendations.
highlights: Four nurse practitioners with specialty training in functional medicine
Comprehensive diagnostic testing including hormone, thyroid, stool, and micronutrient assessment
targetAudience: Patients with chronic illness, complex symptoms, or hormonal imbalances seeking root-cause treatment.
